name: Banana-Yogurt Smoothie
tagline: Three-ingredient smoothie — potassium, B6, B2, and probiotics
highlight: Frozen banana = creamy texture without ice cream

hero.alt: Pale-yellow banana smoothie in a glass topped with crushed pistachios and cinnamon
hero.caption: banana smoothie — yogurt-based, post-workout

healthFacts: One banana = 420mg potassium — covers ~12% of daily need.
Yogurt adds 6g protein, 200mg calcium, and live probiotics in 150ml.
Vitamin B6 (0.4mg per banana) supports neurotransmitter synthesis.
Honey adds antimicrobial polyphenols; jaggery is a lower-GI alternative.

steps.title: Freeze the banana
steps.detail: Slice the banana into rounds and freeze for at least 1 hour ahead (or use straight from the fridge if rushed).
steps.tip: Always have frozen banana slices ready in the freezer — instant smoothies.

steps.title: Blend smooth
steps.detail: Combine banana, yogurt, milk, honey/jaggery, cardamom, and cinnamon in a blender. Blend 30 seconds until completely smooth.
steps.tip: Add a teaspoon of flax or chia for fiber and omega-3 ALA.

steps.title: Pour and garnish
steps.detail: Pour into a tall glass. Top with crushed pistachios. Drink immediately — banana smoothies oxidise within 15 minutes.
steps.tip: A pinch of saffron makes it festive and adds antioxidants.
